pageTitle: Smart Waste Sorting Equipment Built for High-Value Resource Recovery
bodyHtml:
AI Sorting Systems for Global Recycling Projects

Smart Waste Sorting Equipment Built for High-Value Resource Recovery

WEI LAN provides modular optical sorting centers and integrated construction waste recycling lines for plastic recyclables, C&D waste, bulky waste, and smart city environmental infrastructure.

Explore Products Talk to Sales

Plastic sorting rate

C&D line capacity option

Qualifications & Honors

What Builds Buyer Confidence

Credential-backed manufacturing, verifiable technology assets, and carbon data support help overseas buyers evaluate WEI LAN before a project discussion.

ISO

Certified Management Systems

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 support manufacturing quality, environmental responsibility, and operational safety.

CO2

Carbon Trading Data Support

Digital dashboards can connect recovery volume, cumulative weight, sorting categories, and carbon indicators for carbon asset evaluation.

IP

64 Independent IP Assets

Patent-protected equipment and intelligent sorting technologies support AI recognition, modular systems, and automated workflows.

HT

National High-Tech Enterprise

Recognized environmental technology company focused on smart sorting equipment, IoT systems, and digital operation platforms.

View details

Product Lines

Two systems for modern resource recovery facilities

Designed for operators who need compact layouts, faster deployment, reliable long-running production, and digital visibility across the complete sorting process.

Super Optical Sorting System

AI optical sorting center for recyclable plastics

Modular sorting modules identify and separate PET bottles, HDPE bottles, PP, and mixed plastics by material and color. The system supports cyclic sorting with intelligent bins and a digital control cabin.

  • 0.6-2 t/h throughput across V1, V2, and V3 configurations
  • 5, 9, or 10 material categories depending on configuration
  • Skid-mounted modules reduce installation and maintenance complexity

View AI optical sorting details

Construction and Bulky Waste Line

Integrated C&D waste disposal and resource utilization line

The Lion One integrated crushing and screening station combines feeding, crushing, screening, magnetic separation, air separation, and baling equipment for recyclable aggregates and light materials.

  • 20-70 t/h capacity range for project sizing
  • 35 m2 single-machine footprint for compact project sites
  • Hydraulic drive with adjustable crushing particle size

View construction waste line details

Solutions by Material

Built around real waste streams and project conditions

Use material type, target output, available footprint, and automation level to match the right WEI LAN system configuration before quotation and layout planning.

01

PET bottle sorting

Separate transparent, green, blue, and mixed-color PET streams with AI recognition and cyclic intelligent sorting.

  • Input: post-consumer PET bottles
  • Output: value-ready PET color streams
  • Recommended system: AI optical sorting
02

HDPE and PP sorting

Stabilize plastic recovery for mixed recyclables where manual sorting struggles with material purity and operating consistency.

  • Input: HDPE, PP, mixed rigid plastics
  • Output: cleaner grouped plastic fractions
  • Recommended system: AI optical sorting
03

Construction waste recycling

Recover aggregates, metals, and light materials from construction, decoration, and demolition waste with integrated process control.

  • Input: mixed C&D waste streams
  • Output: recycled aggregate and separated materials
  • Recommended system: Lion One line
04

Bulky waste processing

Handle oversized mixed waste with crushing, screening, magnetic separation, and air separation in a compact project footprint.

  • Input: bulky waste and light mixed waste
  • Output: recyclable fractions and baled material
  • Recommended system: Lion One line

Engineering Advantages

Future-ready systems with practical deployment value

01

Modular deployment

Factory-prefabricated modules simplify lifting, commissioning, transport, and maintenance while shortening project delivery cycles.

02

AI recognition and control

Large-model data capabilities, optical capture, robotic sorting, PLC control, and DCS integration support stable automated operation.

03

Digital management cockpit

Video monitoring, equipment status, alerts, carbon indicators, throughput, cumulative weight, and reports are unified in one visual platform.

04

Industrial aesthetics

Enclosed equipment structures reduce noise and dust exposure while presenting a clean, high-end equipment image for modern facilities.

Specifications

Core product parameters

WEI LAN equipment configuration overview
System Configuration Capacity Sorting / Process Scope Footprint / Size Power / Drive
Super Optical Sorting GL01V1-5 Mini 0.6-0.8 t/h 5 material types 8 x 3 x 3 m 30 kW
Super Optical Sorting GL01V2-9 Standard 0.8-1.2 t/h 9 material types 12 x 3 x 6 m 45 kW
Super Optical Sorting GL01V3-10 Plus 1.5-2 t/h 10 material types 17 x 3 x 6 m 53 kW
Construction Waste Line Lion One integrated station 20-70 t/h Crushing, screening, magnetic separation, air separation, baling 35 m2, 11.7 x 3 x 3.1 m Full hydraulic drive

Applications

Built for overseas recycling, municipal, and industrial projects

Plastic recycling sorting plants

Separate PET transparent bottles, green bottles, blue bottles, mixed-color bottles, HDPE white materials, PP, and other mixed materials.

C&D waste recycling facilities

Process construction waste, decoration waste, demolition waste, bulky waste, sand, aggregates, light materials, metals, wood, plastics, and textiles.

Smart city sanitation projects

Connect sorting equipment with IoT monitoring, automated weighing, inventory analysis, operating reports, and remote production control.

Featured References

Reference-ready project stories for buyer evaluation

Until full overseas case pages are published, the home page can surface domestic references and typical configurations without overstating project geography.

Typical Configuration Reference | Smart City

Resource recovery center with digital cockpit

Typical modular layout combining sorting, weighing, reporting, and remote management for resource recovery and operating visibility.

Service & Support

Engineering support from proposal to long-running operation

Overseas buyers do not only evaluate equipment. They also evaluate whether the supplier can support process planning, layout definition, commissioning, training, and follow-up operations.

01

Pre-sales consulting

Share waste type, composition, target output, site limits, and local conditions. WEI LAN can recommend a suitable system direction before layout and quotation.

02

Process and layout planning

Configuration advice can be aligned with capacity target, available footprint, process modules, voltage, and automation level for overseas project evaluation.

03

Installation and commissioning

Factory-prefabricated and modular equipment helps simplify transport, on-site installation, commissioning, and operating handover for project teams.

04

Remote support and spare parts

Digital monitoring, operating data visibility, maintenance guidance, and spare parts coordination help reduce downtime after startup.

Contact / RFQ

Tell us what your team is evaluating

Share your project stage, waste stream, target capacity, and document needs. WEI LAN can review the project direction and prepare a suitable proposal path for your team.

Request Engineering Proposal Review Product Systems
